ambiguity: The precise README filename/path is not specified.
The exact 'current status' details to record are not provided.
The verification method for final file state is not explicitly defined.
assumptions: A README file exists in the target repository.
A minimal documentation-only change is acceptable.
constraints: Operate within the repository rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo.
The README change should be small and safe.
The update should record current status.
Final file state must be verified.
context_needed: Exact README file path/name in this repository (for example README vs README.md).
What 'current status' content should be recorded (source of truth or required wording).
Expected verification criteria for the final file state (content-only, path+content, or diff confirmation).
envelope.normalized_input: Inspect the repository at live_appv2_probe_repo, apply a minimal safe update to the README to capture current status, and confirm the resulting file state.
envelope.raw_input: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.
envelope.user_goal: Have the repository documentation updated with a small, safe current-status note in the README and have the final README state verified.

artifact_contracts.description: Runtime scope input identifying the repository root.
Runtime scope input identifying the documentation target name.
Discovery evidence for actual README path/name inside the repository.
Observed current workspace/repository status facts to be recorded in README note.
Minimal, safe documentation-only edit plan for inserting/updating a current-status note.
Record of the applied README modification.
Verification evidence that final README path and content state are correct after mutation.
User-facing completion summary grounded in mutation and verification ledger evidence.

global_invariants: Operate only within repository root literal "live_appv2_probe_repo".
Preserve literal documentation target "README" when resolving and reporting the README file.
Apply only a small, safe, documentation-only change.
Do not claim repository/file state without runtime or tool evidence.
Record current status using discovered workspace facts or explicit runtime-supplied wording; do not invent status details.
MUTATE must be followed by VERIFY, and verification must confirm final README file state.
phase_plan.objective: Inspect live_appv2_probe_repo, make a minimal safe README current-status update, and verify the final README file state.

acceptance_checks: Both required inputs are present before discovery starts.
readme_discovery_observation includes repository_root, readme_candidates, selected_readme_path, and exists.
No claims are made without tool/runtime evidence.
phases.goal: Identify the concrete README path in the target repository and gather evidence-based current workspace status facts.
instructions: Inspect only within repository root live_appv2_probe_repo.
Enumerate README candidates and select the concrete target path with a clear reason.
Collect workspace status facts from runtime/tool observations only.
Do not infer or invent status details.

acceptance_checks: readme_update_contract includes target_readme_path, change_scope, status_note_text, status_note_source, and safety_constraints.
status_note_source is either workspace_status_observation or runtime_supplied.
Planned change remains documentation-only and minimal.
phases.goal: Produce a minimal documentation-only contract for inserting/updating a current-status note in the selected README.
instructions: Use discovery outputs to define exact target_readme_path.
Compose status_note_text strictly from workspace_status_observation or explicit runtime-supplied wording.
List safety constraints that prevent scope creep and non-documentation edits.

acceptance_checks: Exactly one file is changed and it matches target_readme_path.
before_content_hash and after_content_hash are present and different when mutation is applied.
diff_summary reflects a minimal status-note documentation change.
phases.goal: Apply only the planned minimal README status-note update and record before/after mutation evidence.
instructions: Apply mutation only to target_readme_path from readme_update_contract.
Capture before and after content hashes and summarize diff.
Record changed_files and line_change_count in mutation record.

acceptance_checks: readme_verification_evidence includes verified_readme_path, checks, and all_checks_passed.
All required checks are present in checks array.
all_checks_passed is true only when each required check passed with evidence.
Verification is grounded in runtime/tool evidence.
phases.goal: Verify that the README mutation was applied to the correct path, includes the status note, and stayed within allowed scope.
instructions: Verify selected README path exists after mutation.
Verify mutation was applied to the same selected README path.
Verify status note presence in final README content.
Verify changed files remained within declared scope.

acceptance_checks: finalization_report includes summary, updated_readme_path, verification_result, and evidence_refs.
Report remains scoped to README update task.
phases.goal: Produce a concise completion report referencing mutation and verification evidence.
instructions: Summarize what was updated in README and where.
Include verification result and evidence references.
Do not claim success if verification did not pass.

phase_plan.strategy: First discover the actual README path and current workspace status details to avoid incorrect edits, then define a minimal change approach, apply only the documentation mutation, verify the resulting file path+content state with concrete evidence, and finish with a concise user-facing completion report.
success_criteria: A concrete README path under "live_appv2_probe_repo" is discovered and evidenced.
A minimal README status-note update contract is produced from discovered evidence and safety constraints.
Exactly the intended README documentation change is recorded in mutation evidence with before/after state.
Verification evidence shows all required checks passed for path, scope, and status-note presence.
Final report summarizes completion and cites mutation and verification evidence artifacts.

prompt: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_probe_repo, inspect the workspace, make a small safe README update that records the current status, and verify the final file state.
